title: Vibe-Trading: How The Best Traders Actually Use AI
author: TheReaIIronMan
selftext:
Vibe trading in a new process where users create, test, and deploy profitable algorithmic trading strategies from prompts, similar to Vibe coding.

It stands to lower the barrier to entry for real quantitative analysis and algorithmic trading. However, like vibecoding, it can be incredibly dangerous in the hands of a novice.

For me personally, I’m up over 130% because I’ve integrated AI into my trading workflow. My friends and family all have outstanding returns as well. Feel like a cheat code, but it’s only a matter of time before it becomes oversaturated.

Have you tried to Vibe trade yet?  Why or why not?
